title: psidium oncocalyx
intro: Psidium oncocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the Guinean strawberry or strawberry myrtle. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Psidium oncocalyx include antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, as well as potential treatments for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made through infusions or decoctions, and are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
